news.headline: Fed signals one more rate cut likely before end of year
news.summary: US central bank may lower rates one more time in 2026. Lower rates = cheaper borrowing, can lift stocks.

news.headline: Nvidia announces new AI chip, beats Q1 earnings
news.summary: New chip faster than last gen. Earnings beat expectations. Stock rose 6% after-hours.

news.headline: ASX 200 finishes flat as miners drag, banks gain
news.summary: Australia's index ended unchanged. Mining fell on weak iron ore; banks offset losses.

news.headline: Oil drops below $70 on softening demand outlook
news.summary: Oil fell as analysts warned global demand may slow. Cheaper petrol but hurts energy companies.

news.headline: RBA leaves cash rate unchanged at 4.10%
news.summary: Aussie central bank held rates. Signals it's watching inflation data closely.

news.headline: BHP slips as iron ore drops on weak China data
news.summary: Iron ore -4% on weak Chinese construction. Australia's biggest miner felt the hit.
